title: Senior Teacher - Cuemath Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Cuemath Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath Advisory Limited in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath Advisory Limited:
Cuemath Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath Advisory Limited!
